title: Intense Peppery Portuguese Danmuji Casserole
description: A dense and adventurous Portuguese dish featuring danmuji, cooked in a bain-marie to create a rich and peppery flavor profile, this ovo-vegetarian friendly casserole is perfect for those looking to try something new.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onions and garlic until softened.
Add the danmuji and portuguese peppers to the skillet and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and shredded cheese.
Add the cooked danmuji and pepper mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and place in a bain-marie.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the eggs are set and the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
